allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add human-readable output formatting for all commands

Replace raw JSON output with formatted text for all commands. Add --json
flag to preserve raw JSON output for scripting. The exec command shows
just the output value, objects display aligned key-value pairs, and
arrays render as numbered or bulleted lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
